name: Halloween 'Creep it Real' Serving Tray Black - Hyde and EEK! Boutique™: Melamine, Bamboo, Skeleton Theme
description:
Entertain guests or family members during the creepy season with the Halloween "Creep it Real" Serving Tray from Hyde and EEK! Boutique™. This black serving tray features dancing skeletons and bats along with the text "Creep it Real" for seasonal fun. Designed in a rectangle shape, this BPA-free serving tray is made with bamboo and melamine. Plus, it's dishwasher safe for easy cleaning. Add coordinating white and orange appetizer plates and bowl to create a delightful Halloween table setting.

Hyde and EEK! Boutique™: Thrilling delights. Curious oddities.
